testCases: TC1: input { roomWidth:10, roomLength:10, flooringType:"hardwood", installIncluded:false, wasteFactor:"0" } → output { total:800, breakdown:{area:100, wastePercent:0, materialNeeded:100, materialCost:800, installationCost:0} }

TC2: input { roomWidth:10, roomLength:10, flooringType:"hardwood", installIncluded:true, wasteFactor:"0" } → output { total:1200, breakdown:{area:100, wastePercent:0, materialNeeded:100, materialCost:800, installationCost:400} }

TC3: input { roomWidth:10, roomLength:10, flooringType:"hardwood", installIncluded:false, wasteFactor:"5" } → output { total:840, breakdown:{area:100, wastePercent:5, materialNeeded:105, materialCost:840, installationCost:0} }

TC4: input { roomWidth:20, roomLength:10, flooringType:"carpet", installIncluded:false, wasteFactor:"10" } → output { total:660, breakdown:{area:200, wastePercent:10, materialNeeded:220, materialCost:660, installationCost:0} }

TC5: input { roomWidth:5, roomLength:10, flooringType:"tile", installIncluded:true, wasteFactor:"15" } → output { total:437.5, breakdown:{area:50, wastePercent:15, materialNeeded:57.5, materialCost:287.5, installationCost:150} }
TC6: input { roomWidth:0, roomLength:10, flooringType:"hardwood", installIncluded:false, wasteFactor:"0" } → output { error: "Room width must be > 0" }
TC7: input { roomWidth:10, roomLength:-5, flooringType:"carpet", installIncluded:false, wasteFactor:"0" } → output { error: "Room length must be > 0" }
TC8: input { roomWidth:"ten", roomLength:10, flooringType:"tile", installIncluded:false, wasteFactor:"0" } → output { error: "Room width must be a positive number" }
TC9: input { roomWidth:10, roomLength:10, flooringType:"vinyl", installIncluded:false, wasteFactor:"0" } → output { error: "Invalid flooring type" }
TC10: input { roomWidth:10, roomLength:10, flooringType:"hardwood", installIncluded:false, wasteFactor:"20" } → output { error: "Invalid waste factor" }
TC11: input { roomWidth:10, roomLength:10, flooringType:"hardwood", installIncluded:"yes", wasteFactor:"0" } → output { error: "Installation included must be true or false" }

TC12: input { roomWidth:10, roomLength:10, flooringType:"HARDWOOD", installIncluded:false, wasteFactor:"0" } → output { total:800, breakdown:{area:100, wastePercent:0, materialNeeded:100, materialCost:800, installationCost:0} }

TC13: input { roomWidth:10, roomLength:10, flooringType:"Tile", installIncluded:false, wasteFactor:"0" } → output { total:500, breakdown:{area:100, wastePercent:0, materialNeeded:100, materialCost:500, installationCost:0} }

TC14: input { roomWidth:100, roomLength:100, flooringType:"hardwood", installIncluded:true, wasteFactor:"0" } → output { total:120000, breakdown:{area:10000, wastePercent:0, materialNeeded:10000, materialCost:80000, installationCost:40000} }

TC15: input { roomWidth:12.5, roomLength:10.5, flooringType:"carpet", installIncluded:true, wasteFactor:5 } → output { total:610.31, breakdown:{area:131.25, wastePercent:5, materialNeeded:137.8125, materialCost:413.44, installationCost:196.88} }
TC16: input {} → output { error: "Room width is required" }   (missing all required)
TC17: input { roomWidth:10, roomLength:10, flooringType:"hardwood" } → output { error: "Waste factor is required" }

TC18: input { roomWidth:10.2, roomLength:8, flooringType:"tile", installIncluded:false, wasteFactor:"0" } → output { total:408, breakdown:{area:81.6, wastePercent:0, materialNeeded:81.6, materialCost:408, installationCost:0} }
TC19: input { roomWidth:10, roomLength:10, flooringType:"hardwood", installIncluded:false, wasteFactor:"0" } → same as TC1 (duplicate for completeness)

TC20: input { roomWidth:10, roomLength:10, flooringType:"hardwood", installIncluded:undefined, wasteFactor:"0" } → output { total:800, breakdown:{...installationCost:0} } (missing install defaults to false)
TC21: input { roomWidth:10, roomLength:10, flooringType:"hardwood", wasteFactor:"0" } → output { total:800, breakdown:{...installationCost:0} } (missing installIncluded defaults to false)
TC22: input { roomWidth:10, roomLength:10, flooringType:"hardwood", installIncluded:false, wasteFactor:"-5" } → output { error: "Invalid waste factor" }
TC23: input { roomWidth:10, roomLength:10, flooringType:"hardwood", installIncluded:false, wasteFactor:"text" } → output { error: "Invalid waste factor" }
TC24: input { roomWidth:10, roomLength:10, flooringType:"carpet", installIncluded:true, wasteFactor:"notanum" } → error
TC25: input { roomWidth:10, roomLength:10, flooringType:"carpet", installIncluded:true, wasteFactor:10 } → output { total:... } (numeric wasteFactor should work)
